_note: Gate runs per produced image (one file at a time). Canonical canvas is 1080x1080 square; portrait or landscape brand variants may override via brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json.

checks.desc: (a) The subject described by the prompt is clearly present and correctly rendered — no missing elements, no generation failures (distorted limbs, incoherent content, broken anatomy).
(b) No visible AI artifacts — no blurry patches, visible watermarks, corrupted regions, or obvious seams.
(c) Any text present in the image is legible and correctly spelled — no garbled characters, no Lorem ipsum, no unintended language.
(d) Color palette reads as premium and intentional — not washed-out, oversaturated, or off-brand.
(e) Composition is strong — clear focal point, well-framed subject with appropriate headroom, not cluttered or awkwardly cropped at edges.
